textByHash.f8c6a6243fef527f55bb56a1049f1beaea70347d: Bored, bored, bored. These Fremenniks are taking ages.
textByHash.34bf3b1ee059988ac4390d268462315f34778b1c: Hey, we arrived precisely when we told your representatives. Lack of planning on your part does not constitute an emergency on my part.
textByHash.21975e83051a53b777736d48369120670153f5e9: I'll just finish the roast off.
textByHash.e2326245fa6f921e85fced046f4d407c067641db: Ah, yes. Now that's what I call a meal.
